name: qom-strict-argcheck
description: Strict QoM profile for high-reliability workflows. Requires perfect schema fidelity and high instruction compliance.

schema_fidelity.description: Payloads must perfectly conform to declared SType schema.

instruction_compliance.description: At least 97% of assertions must pass.

groundedness.description: 95% of claims must be supported by citations.
groundedness.note: Optional for structured data workflows; enable for LLM-generated responses.

determinism_jitter.description: Output must be 95% semantically stable under perturbations.
determinism_jitter.note: Optional for deterministic APIs; enable for LLM workflows.

ontology_adherence.description: 98% of ontology constraints must be satisfied.

assertions.description: Event end time must be after start time.
Event duration must be between 1 minute and 24 hours.
If attendees field exists, it must not be empty.
